'''Abin-Ral-Xufush''' was a ruthless and cunning [[Tiss'shar]] trader who turned to [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]].

==Biography==
Abin-Ral-Xufush was commander of the pirate fleet known as the [[Shadow Wing]]<ref name="CatSW">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030619hero|text=''Hero's Guide'' Web Enhancement #2}}</ref> (also known as the Dark Wing<ref name="P&P" />), which plied the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] and other major spacelanes, hunting anything he could track.<ref name="P&P" /> He held a strong anti-[[Human/Legends|Human]] prejudice,<ref name="CatSW" /> and was approximately 15% more likely to strike Human-populated worlds.<ref name="P&P" />

However, Abin's prejudice only extended to his prey; all Shadow Wing members were treated equally, regardless of [[Species/Legends|species]] or [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. He rarely accepted new crew without first checking their trustworthiness and value to the organization, testing them first with trivial assignments, then increasing their difficulty until Abin was satisfied with their worthiness. He showed no tolerance for insubordinate or treacherous crew, and ran a disciplined ship. His crew respected his leadership skill and tactical savvy, and demonstrated great loyalty to him.<ref name="CatSW" />

Abin absorbed all takings from his raids directly into the Shadow Wing; combat-capable ships were put to use in the fleet, other ships were cannibalized for components,<ref name="P&P" /> slaves were recruited,<ref name="CatSW" /> and cargoes were rarely sold, instead being used to support the ships and crews. He built up a fleet capable of invading and looting entire planets, descending like a swarm of insects, employing overwhelming force to take what it wanted, and departing.<ref name="P&P" />

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] charged Abin-Ral-Xufush with piracy, flight to avoid Imperial prosecution, and conspiracy. He was the target of a 300,000-[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] galaxywide bounty, a rare honor for a nonpolitical criminal during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="P&P" />

==Personality and traits==
Abin-Ral-Xufush was a ruthless and efficient leader with a keen mind, tactical savvy, and a strong anti-human sentiment.<ref name="CatSW" /> He was a predator that hunted anything he could track, and held no favorites when it came to choosing targets other than attacking human planets more frequently than nonhuman ones, though even this could be attributed to the settlement pattern of human worlds.<ref name="P&P" /> His bias against humans was not apparent in his recruiting and promoting practices within the Shadow Wing, where all members were treated fairly regardless of species or [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. He ran a well-disciplined ship, and tolerated neither insubordination nor betrayal;<ref name="CatSW" /> his methods for maintaining discipline across his large fleet and many [[Captain/Legends|captains]] were unknown, as were his ultimate goals in assembling the Shadow Wing.<ref name="P&P" />

Abin was in his early thirties during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Empire and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He had a red diamond pattern on his back and white scales on his underside,<ref name="P&P" /> a pattern consistent with the ''[[sil-ar]]'' race of Tiss'shar.<ref name="GG12">''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''</ref>

==Equipment==
Abin typically wore a green [[baldric]], and kept on his person a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], and a [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] [[StarSlasher Blaster Carbine|StarSlasher]] [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]]. His ship, the [[Fa-Loh-Sui (corvette)|''Fa-Loh-Sui'']], was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] that was regarded as the pride of his fleet; it was stolen from a Rebel command in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Abin named it after a beautiful Tiss'shar [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] of the [[Fa-Loh-Sui|same name]] he once courted.<ref name="P&P" />
